case_title: RAINE, CLIFTON A. VS BATES, JEFFREY R.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,084.99 FILED BY RAINE, CLIFTON A. AS TO DEFENDANT BATES, JEFFREY R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT REQUESTING DISMISSAL OF CASE, FILED. A COPY WAS SENT TO THE PLAINTIFF BY DEFT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2007 - JUDGMENT.BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK S. VANTREE, NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAINE, CLIFTON A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BATES, JEFFREY R. $89.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $89.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF FEES GRANTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-31-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BATES, JEFFREY R.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-11-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-11-2007 BY PAUL SLAVIT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK S. VANTREE. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH PARTIES RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (506).
